mapper.sql: request_id, tenant_id, current_property_mode, requested_property_mode, owners_assembly_resolution_reference, change_reason, status, applicant_account_id, applicant_user_id, applicant_dept_id, submitted_at, reviewer_account_id, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_dept_id, review_comment, reviewed_at, executed_at, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_property_management_mode_change_request WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, request_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_property_management_mode_change_request ( tenant_id, current_property_mode, requested_property_mode, owners_assembly_resolution_reference, change_reason, status, applicant_account_id, applicant_user_id, applicant_dept_id, submitted_at, reviewer_account_id, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_dept_id, review_comment, reviewed_at, executed_at, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{currentPropertyMode}, #{requestedPropertyMode}, #{ownersAssemblyResolutionReference}, #{changeReason}, #{status}, #{applicantAccountId}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewerAccountId}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewerDeptId}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewedAt}, #{executedAt}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_property_management_mode_change_request SET requested_property_mode = #{row.requestedPropertyMode}, owners_assembly_resolution_reference = #{row.ownersAssemblyResolutionReference}, change_reason = #{row.changeReason}, status = #{row.status}, submitted_at = #{row.submittedAt}, reviewer_account_id = #{row.reviewerAccountId}, reviewer_user_id = #{row.reviewerUserId}, reviewer_dept_id = #{row.reviewerDeptId}, review_comment = #{row.reviewComment}, reviewed_at = #{row.reviewedAt}, executed_at = #{row.executedAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = #{row.updateTime} WHERE request_id = #{row.requestId} AND tenant_id = #{row.tenantId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT material_id, request_id, material_type, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, status, create_time FROM t_property_management_mode_change_material WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time ASC, material_id ASC

SELECT audit_id, request_id, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_dept_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, payload_json::TEXT AS payload_json, create_time FROM t_property_management_mode_change_audit WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, audit_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_property_management_mode_change_audit ( request_id, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_dept_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{actorAccountId}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorDeptId}, #{eventType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tenant_community SET property_mode = #{requestedMode}, property_mode_history = COALESCE(property_mode_history, '[]'::JSONB) || CAST(#{historyJson} AS JSONB), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND property_mode IS NOT DISTINCT FROM #{expectedCurrentMode}
